title: Cosmos Remix — Vortex you can retune and reskin live
summary: Remixable particle vortex: particles sit on concentric rings (radius ∝ √i) whose angular speed rises toward the centre (differential rotation), while the whole field is pulled inward then outward by sin(2π·u) — a hypnotic breathing whirlpool with a bright fast eye. A live glass panel retunes palette / shape / density / spread / speed / dot size plus a Twist knob that sets the spiral curl, and reskins to any brand colour in one click. Self-contained, zero dependencies; ?auto=1 hides the panel and renders a deterministic seamless loop.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html and use the panel (top-right) to retune live — pick a palette to reskin to any brand colour, drag Density/Spread/Speed/Dot, set Twist (0–6) to tighten or loosen the whirlpool curl, ↻ Seed to shuffle, ⧉ Copy to copy your config. KEY TECHNIQUES: a differential-rotation vortex — radius ∝ √i, inner rings spin faster via an inner-weight (base·6/(r+base·6)) multiplying an integer-turn u-rotation so frame(0)===frame(LOOP), a static log-spiral winding (Twist·ln r) sets the curl, and sin(2π·u) breathes the whole disk in and out; colour comes from ramp(pal.cols,t) drawn additively (globalCompositeOperation 'lighter') with size/alpha boosted toward the bright eye; PARAMS convention = window.__params describes knobs and window.setParam(key,value) applies them so a generic remix harness can auto-build panels; theme tokens = a PALETTES map driving both a CSS accent var and the dot ramp; SHAPES + drawShape render the chosen particle glyph cheaply. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: add palettes to PALETTES, extend __params, raise Density/Dot if too dark.
